---
title: "Contact"
---

## Affiliation

Department of Biology  
University of Southern Denmark  
SDU Climate Cluster  
Sabbatical affiliation (2025-2026): University of Edinburgh

## Contact details

- Email: [jones@biology.sdu.dk](mailto:jones@biology.sdu.dk)

## Profiles and links

- [SDU profile](https://portal.findresearcher.sdu.dk/en/persons/owen-r-jones/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/jonesor)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=W5kTQvoAAAAJ)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5720-4686)

Note: I am currently on sabbatical at the University of Edinburgh (2025-2026). Email is the best way to get in touch.
